strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq, with direct alignment to AI strategy goals
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries demonstrating technical depth and initiative
concerns: No explicit mention of Master's or PhD in AI-related field, missing preferred credential
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience at director level
German language skill is only basic, potentially limiting stakeholder engagement in Berlin-based cloud/AI teams
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with deep full-stack and AI-agent work, and his open-source leadership demonstrates the entrepreneurial spirit and technical fluency the role demands. While he lacks an advanced AI degree and explicit cloud strategy experience, his hands-on AI infrastructure contributions and proven ability to drive innovation compensate significantly, making him a strong candidate despite minor gaps.
